import string
import list
import io

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
end

fn byte_at_or(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn parse_ints(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut keep = true
    while keep
      if i >= n
        keep = false
      else
        let b = byte_at_or(line, i)
        if is_ws(b)
          i = i + 1
        else
          keep = false
        end
      end
    end
    let start = i
    mut keep2 = true
    while keep2
      if i >= n
        keep2 = false
      else
        let b = byte_at_or(line, i)
        if is_ws(b)
          keep2 = false
        else
          i = i + 1
        end
      end
    end
    if start < i
      let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
  end
  result
end

fn insert_sorted(_ xs: List<Int>, _ v: Int) -> List<Int>
  if list.contains(xs, v)
    xs
  else
    mut result: List<Int> = []
    mut inserted = false
    let n = list.len(xs)
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      match list.get(xs, i)
      when Some(x)
        if not inserted
          if v < x
            result = list.push(result, v)
            inserted = true
          end
        end
        result = list.push(result, x)
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if not inserted
      result = list.push(result, v)
    end
    result
  end
end

fn intersect(_ a: List<Int>, _ b: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = list.len(a)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match list.get(a, i)
    when Some(x)
      if list.contains(b, x)
        result = insert_sorted(result, x)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn format_result(_ xs: List<Int>) -> String
  mut output = ""
  mut first = true
  let n = list.len(xs)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match list.get(xs, i)
    when Some(x)
      if first
        output = "#{x}"
        first = false
      else
        output = "#{output} #{x}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  output
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums1 = parse_ints(line1)
let nums2 = parse_ints(line2)
let result = intersect(nums1, nums2)

if list.len(result) == 0
  println("empty")
else
  println(format_result(result))
end
